description: Intent-only request: ask for the meaning of important emails instead of assuming rule-based or judgment-based handling.

text: Say whether this should be handled as a deterministic workflow, a hybrid workflow with a bounded AI judgment step, a full agent, or a single AI task. Briefly explain why in terms of control flow, runtime decision-making, tool-use loops, unstructured data, and whether the next action depends on prior results.

processExpectations: The agent treats the meaning of important emails as underspecified.
The agent asks, or explicitly says the next step is to ask, whether email importance can be defined by deterministic rules or requires judgment.
The agent explains that rule-derivable importance would be a workflow while judged importance would be hybrid.
